mission.title: gitea: Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository
mission.description: Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository . Requested by 150+ users.

steps.title: Check current gitea setup
steps.description:
Verify your gitea version and configuration:
```bash
gitea --version
```
This feature requires a working gitea installation.

steps.title: Review gitea configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant gitea configuration:
I like the feature of mirroring the repositories by pulling the remote repositories.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository
steps.description:
Adds the ability to push-mirror a repository to a remote destination.

ToDo:
maybe #2280
```yaml
#!/bin/bash
git push --mirror --quiet https://user:token@github.com/osuripple/hanayo.git &> /dev/null
echo 'osuripple/hanayo updated'
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Ability to automatically push to remote mirror repository " is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Adds the ability to push-mirror a repository to a remote destination.

ToDo:
maybe #2280

prerequisites.description: A working gitea installation or development environment.
